mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, p.post_name, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_post p ON u.post_id = p.post_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.role_id ORDER BY u.user_id ASC

SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, p.post_name, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_post p ON u.post_id = p.post_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.role_id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
ORDER BY u.user_id ASC

SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, p.post_name, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_post p ON u.post_id = p.post_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, email, phone, dept_id, post_id, role_id, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{deptId}, #{postId}, #{roleId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
